name: Claude Dev Assistant
description: An intelligent development workflow featuring Socratic interviewing, dual-agent debate, expert team coordination, and RAG system design. Built on Claude Code for seamless AI-assisted development.
longDescription:
Claude Dev Assistant transforms your development workflow with:

- **Socratic Interview Mode**: Deep requirement gathering through guided questioning
- **Dual-Agent Debate**: Architectural decisions validated through AI debate
- **Expert Team Coordination**: Specialized agents for architecture, coding, review, and debugging
- **RAG Design Skills**: Built-in retrieval-augmented generation system design
- **Phase-Based Workflow**: Structured development from spec to delivery
